positive: A mystical, glowing lantern casting warm light on a group of stylized woodland creatures (fox, owl, deer, rabbit) gathered under a bioluminescent forest canopy. The style is a vibrant, whimsical gothic illustration with clean lines and solid silhouettes, reminiscent of a modern tattoo flash or apparel print. Composition is highly centralized and balanced. Use deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with warm golds and amber highlights from the lantern. The overall effect should be magical, detailed, yet clean for textile printing. Highly detailed digital painting, vector-like crispness, cinematic lighting, high contrast, perfect symmetry, volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, low quality, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, logo, signature, copyrighted, cartoonish
